findings.location: s2 — doHeader validator method in code example
findings.description: The knowledge file's doHeader implementation inside FileLayoutValidatorAction omits the date field validation logic present in the source. The source checks `inputData.getString("date")` against `BusinessDateUtil.getDate()` and throws `TransactionAbnormalEnd(102, HEADER_RECORD_ERROR_FAILURE_CODE, date, businessDate)` on mismatch. This is the only example in the source showing how to read field values from DataRecord and perform business-level (non-layout) validation within a FileValidatorAction.
findings.source_evidence: public Result doHeader(...) { ... String date = inputData.getString("date"); String businessDate = BusinessDateUtil.getDate(); if (!businessDate.equals(date)) { throw new TransactionAbnormalEnd(102, HEADER_RECORD_ERROR_FAILURE_CODE, date, businessDate); } ... }

findings.location: s2 — onFileEnd implementation in code example
findings.description: The knowledge file's onFileEnd omits the two writeLog calls present in the source that log total record count and data record count after successful validation. The source shows `writeLog("M000000002", ctx.getLastRecordNumber())` and `writeLog("M000000003", dataRecordCount)` as the expected pattern for post-validation logging in onFileEnd.
findings.source_evidence: public void onFileEnd(ExecutionContext ctx) { ... writeLog("M000000002", ctx.getLastRecordNumber()); writeLog("M000000003", dataRecordCount); }

findings.description: s1 content references `FileBatchAction` ("FileBatchAction を継承する場合は getValidatorAction() をオーバーライド") and `getValidatorAction` by name, but neither is listed in the s1 hints array. Both are PascalCase class/method names directly referenced in the s1 section text.
findings.source_evidence: なお、FileBatchAction を継承したバッチ業務アクションを作成する場合は、getValidatorAction()メソッドをオーバーライドし

findings.description: `RecordTypeBinding` is referenced in s2 text ("詳細は RecordTypeBinding を参照") as a class to consult for the dispatch naming convention, but is absent from the s2 hints array.
findings.source_evidence: 規約についての詳細は RecordTypeBinding を参照すること。
